title: Chart Pattern Recognition — TradingView-style automatic pattern detection

observation.gap_identified: TradingView's #1 premium feature (chart pattern recognition) was completely missing from Aegis. No automatic detection of classic reversal/continuation patterns (double top/bottom, head & shoulders, triangles, wedges) or support/resistance levels.

implementation.feature_built: Full chart pattern recognition engine: pivot detection (configurable window), support/resistance level clustering, double top/bottom, head & shoulders (+ inverse), ascending/descending/symmetrical triangles, rising/falling wedges. Each pattern includes direction, confidence score, confirmation status, neckline, measured move target price, and date labels. Composite bias signal (bullish/bearish/neutral) and signal score [-1,+1] for integration. Wired into stock detail endpoint (chart_patterns field), screener (pattern_bias + pattern_count), and dedicated /api/stock/{ticker}/patterns endpoint. Frontend TypeScript types and API client function added.

limitations: Pattern detection uses price pivots only — no volume confirmation yet
No backtesting of pattern effectiveness (hit rate of measured moves)
Synthetic test data may not fully represent real-world edge cases
assessment.self_critique: Could have added volume confirmation for stronger pattern confidence. Could have integrated the pattern signal score into the signal engine as a new component. Would also benefit from a pattern effectiveness backtest to validate the measured move targets.

next_steps: Add volume confirmation to pattern detection (volume should decline during pattern formation)
Add flag and pennant pattern detection
Integrate pattern_signal_score into signal_engine as a new component
Backtest pattern recognition: track measured move hit rates on historical data
Add frontend UI for pattern visualization (overlay on price chart)
